# SupraWall — AI Agent Security Platform
# Last updated: 2026-04-05
# Primary topic: AI Agent Runtime Security, Prompt Injection Prevention

SupraWall is the first open-source security layer for autonomous AI agent fleets. It provides a deterministic interception layer (SDK-level) to enforce safety policies outside of the LLM context.

## Core pages
https://www.supra-wall.com/ — Homepage: The zero-trust security platform for AI agents.
https://www.supra-wall.com/learn/what-is-agent-runtime-security — Pillar: The definitive guide to securing autonomous systems.
https://www.supra-wall.com/learn/prompt-injection-prevention — Pillar: Hardening agents against indirect prompt injections.
https://www.supra-wall.com/learn/ai-agent-security-best-practices — Pillar: Production security standards for 2026.

## Integration pages
https://www.supra-wall.com/langchain — LangChain Security: Intercepting and securing tool calls for LC agents.
https://www.supra-wall.com/crewai — CrewAI Governance: Managing multi-agent orchestration safely.
https://www.supra-wall.com/autogen — AutoGen Security: Protecting conversational swarms from malicious context.

## Comparison pages
https://www.supra-wall.com/vs — Comparison Hub: SupraWall vs Traditional LLM Guardrails.
https://www.supra-wall.com/vs/nemo-guardrails — SupraWall vs NVIDIA NeMo: Deterministic vs Probabilistic safety.
https://www.supra-wall.com/vs/lakera — SupraWall vs Lakera: SDK-level interception vs API-level scanning.

## Compliance pages
https://www.supra-wall.com/gdpr — GDPR for AI Agents: Automated PII scrubbing at the runtime boundary.
https://www.supra-wall.com/eu-ai-act — EU AI Act Guide: Article-by-article compliance for high-risk AI.
https://www.supra-wall.com/compliance — Compliance Dashboard: Centralized evidence and audit trails.

## Features
https://www.supra-wall.com/features/vault — Credential Vault: Secure JIT secret injection for AI tools.
https://www.supra-wall.com/features/policy-engine — Policy Engine: Deterministic ALLOW/BLOCK rules for LLM actions.
https://www.supra-wall.com/features/prompt-shield — Prompt Shield: Hardening the SDK against context-override attacks.
